ABOUT_ME.TITLE: About Me
ABOUT_ME.DESCRIPTION: Ich bin Fullstack-Entwickler aus Deutschland. Ich liebe es, Ideen in echte Anwendungen umzusetzen und lerne ständig neue Technologien durch Projekte, praktische Erfahrung und kontinuierliche Weiterentwicklung im Alltag.
ABOUT_ME.LOCATION: Ich bin in Hamburg, Deutschland, ansässig und offen für verschiedene Arbeitsmodelle, einschließlich Remote-Arbeit.
ABOUT_ME.MINDSET: Ich bin offen für neue Technologien und lerne ständig dazu, um mich kontinuierlich weiterzuentwickeln.
ABOUT_ME.PROBLEM_SOLVING: Ich arbeite analytisch und lösungsorientiert. Bei jedem Problem suche ich nach einer effizienten und sauberen Lösung und lerne aus jeder Herausforderung dazu. Dabei sind für mich kreatives Denken, Ausdauer und Teamarbeit besonders wichtig.

SKILLS.TITLE: My Skills
SKILLS.DESCRIPTION: Experience with various front-end technologies in multiple projects.
SKILLS.ENTHUSIASM: Enthusiastic about learning new technologies and frameworks.

PORTFOLIO.TITLE: Portfolio
PORTFOLIO.DESCRIPTION: Explore a selection of my work here - Interact with projects to see my skills in action.

REFERENCES.REF1: Mario really kept the team together with his great organization and clear communication. We wouldn't have got this far without his commitment.
REFERENCES.REF2: Michael really kept the team together with his great organization and clear communication. We wouldn't have got this far without his commitment.
REFERENCES.REF3: Mario really kept the team together with his great organization and clear communication. We wouldn't have got this far without his commitment.

PROJECTS.POKEDEX_DESC: Based on the PokéAPI a simple library that provides and catalogues pokemon information.
PROJECTS.POLLO_DESC: A simple jump-and-run game based on an object-oriented approach. Help the character find coins and explosive bottles to fight the final boss.
PROJECTS.JOIN_DESC: Task manager inspired by the Kanban System. Create and organize tasks using drag and drop functions, assign users and categories.

CONTACT.TITLE: Contact
CONTACT.HEADING: Got a problem to solve?
CONTACT.DESCRIPTION: Encourage people to contact you and describe what role you are interested in. Show that you will add value to their projects through your work.
CONTACT.CTA: Need a Frontend developer? Contact me!
CONTACT.PRIVACY_AFTER: and agree to the processing of my data as outlined.

LEGAL.TITLE: Legal Notice
LEGAL.RESPONSIBLE: Responsible for content according to § 55 Abs. 2 RStV

PRIVACY.TITLE: Privacy Policy
PRIVACY.GENERAL_TEXT: The protection of your personal data is important to me. This website processes personal data exclusively within the framework of legal provisions (GDPR).
PRIVACY.LOGFILES_TEXT: The hosting provider of this website automatically collects and stores information in so-called server log files, which your browser automatically transmits.
PRIVACY.CONTACT_TEXT: If you send me inquiries via the contact form, your details will be stored for the purpose of processing.
PRIVACY.THIRD_TEXT: This website may embed content from third parties such as GitHub or LinkedIn.
PRIVACY.HOSTING_TEXT: This website is hosted by an external service provider.
PRIVACY.SSL_TEXT: This site uses SSL or TLS encryption.
